audit_items.proof_trace: Withdrawals are correctly processed after transactions. Block building flow shows apply_pre_execution_changes() executes before transactions (crates/ethereum/payload/src/lib.rs:188), all transactions execute (lines 206-343), then builder.finish() applies post-execution changes including withdrawals. The alloy-evm BlockExecutor trait (used by Reth) enforces this ordering per EIP-4895, confirmed by test_balance_increment_not_duplicated test.
